channel.title: Energy on jamesm.blog
channel.description: Recent content in Energy on jamesm.blog

item.title: The AI Energy Crisis: Why Data Center Power Will Define the Next Decade
item.description: A grounded look at the energy constraint becoming the binding limit on AI deployment in 2026 - the power demand, the transformer backlogs, the grid interconnect queues, the rising consumer electricity prices, and what it means for the shape of the next decade of compute.
